childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : true, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "mask" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : true, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Mobile", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: selectRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: duplicateRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "allowEdit" : false, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : false, "newLabel" : "", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Single", "selectCheckBox" : "selectRecord", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "Account", "sobjectMapping" : [ { "osElement" : "FirstName", "sObjectField" : "FirstName", "duplicateKey" : false }, { "osElement" : "LastName", "sObjectField" : "LastName", "duplicateKey" : false }, { "osElement" : "Id", "sObjectField" : "Id", "duplicateKey" : true }, { "osElement" : "PersonEmail", "sObjectField" : "PersonEmail", "duplicateKey" : false }, { "osElement" : "PersonMobilePhone", "sObjectField" : "PersonMobilePhone", "duplicateKey" : false } ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 5, "allowClear" : false, "lwcComponentOverride" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: PotentialDuplicate
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Clinician Matching Duplicates in System", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "duplicateRecordFound" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : "Clinician Matching Duplicates in System", "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetClinicianId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SetClinicianId", "elementValueMap" : { "clinicianId" : "=IF(%SelectedRecord% != NULL, %SelectedRecord:Id%,%clinicianId%)" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SetDuplicateRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SetDuplicateRecords", "elementValueMap" : { "duplicateRecordFound" : "=COUNT(%duplicateRecordList%) > 0", "duplicateRecords" : "=%duplicateRecordList%" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }
